notableEvents.detail: Sal Frelick grounds into a double play, second baseman Ben Williamson to shortstop Carson Williams to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Jake Bauers out at 2nd. Sal Frelick out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Blake Perkins pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Blake Perkins grounds into a force out, fielded by shortstop Carson Williams. Sal Frelick out at 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jake Bauers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jake Bauers grounds out to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Sal Frelick to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Christian Yelich pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Christian Yelich homers (1) on a fly ball to right field. Brice Turang scores. Luis Rengifo scores.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Christian Yelich singles on a soft ground ball to pitcher Sean Burke. Brice Turang scores. William Contreras to 3rd. Throwing error by pitcher Sean Burke.

notableEvents.label: Luis Rengifo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis Rengifo grounds out, pitcher Jedixson Paez to first baseman Munetaka Murakami.

notableEvents.label: Blake Perkins pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Blake Perkins pops out to catcher Edgar Quero in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Luis Rengifo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis Rengifo flies out to shortstop Colson Montgomery.
